==== /.src/nodeBuiltinImport.ts (16 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics nodeBuiltinImport:warning
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    // Flagged: ES module imports for covered modules
    import fs from "fs"
                   ~~~~
!!! warning TS377057: Prefer using FileSystem from @effect/platform instead of the Node.js 'fs' module. effect(nodeBuiltinImport)
    import * as fs2 from "node:fs"
                         ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377057: Prefer using FileSystem from @effect/platform instead of the Node.js 'fs' module. effect(nodeBuiltinImport)
    import { readFile } from "fs/promises"
                             ~~~~~~~~~~~~~

    import { readFile as readFile2 } from "node:fs/promises"
                                          ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

    import { join } from "path"
                         ~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377057: Prefer using Path from @effect/platform instead of the Node.js 'path' module. effect(nodeBuiltinImport)
    import path from "node:path"
                     ~~~~~~~~~~~

                     ~~~~~~

    import "node:fs"
           ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377057: Prefer using FileSystem from @effect/platform instead of the Node.js 'fs' module. effect(nodeBuiltinImport)
    
    // Flagged: top-level require
    const fs3 = require("node:fs")
                        ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377057: Prefer using FileSystem from @effect/platform instead of the Node.js 'fs' module. effect(nodeBuiltinImport)
    
    // Not flagged: Effect-native imports
    // @ts-expect-error - @effect/platform not installed in harness
    import { FileSystem } from "@effect/platform"
    
    // Not flagged: third-party modules with similar names
    // @ts-expect-error - fs-extra not installed in harness
    import fsExtra from "fs-extra"
